obligations: do not distribute, vendor, invoke, or production-enable until the exact upstream revision and license text are verified
retain this provenance and gap notice while the candidate remains in research

ownedBoundary: pipeline-owned advisory candidate data and recommendation rules only
no openspec init, filesystem initialization, commitment, or adoption authority

benefit.metric: OpenSpec OPSX token occurrences traced in the current advisory atom

update.policy: Before 2026-10-11, verify the upstream commit, LICENSE, release status, and candidate semantics; keep research-only until all checks are admitted

ownedModifications.description: Pipeline-owned OpenSpec candidate detection and advisory rendering; does not contain or invoke the upstream runtime

rollback.strategy: delete this candidate record and remove the OpenSpec alternative from candidate data without changing the advisory schema or authority boundary

exit.strategy: replace the reference with a pinned, licensed candidate record or retire it while retaining audit provenance
replacementCriteria: replacement has exact upstream revision and verified license obligations
replacement passes proposal conformance and no-auto-init tests

triggers: upstream provenance or license remains unverifiable at next check
candidate no longer contributes unique measured advisory value
security or maintenance evidence cannot be admitted
